pi_items.source: Verified via Mozilla Gecko documentation and Tor Browser preferences evaluation script that 'browser.privatebrowsing.autostart' controls 'Always use private browsing mode' and 'privacy.sanitize.sanitizeOnShutdown' controls 'Clear history when Tor Browser closes'. The required state to retain history across sessions is false.
Extracted from explicit task instructions requesting the user to visit 'https://check.torproject.org/' and 'https://duckduckgo.com/'.

privileged_info_summary: The task accurately translates the requested Tor Browser configuration changes (disabling 'Always use private browsing mode' and 'Clear history when Tor Browser closes') into their respective underlying Firefox boolean preferences ('browser.privatebrowsing.autostart' and 'privacy.sanitize.sanitizeOnShutdown' set to false). The explicitly required domains to test history retention ('check.torproject.org' and 'duckduckgo.com') directly match the task instruction domains.
